name: @spacemolt/lib
description: The definitive TypeScript library for SpaceMolt. WebSocket-v2-first, multi-account, with local state caches. Internals are regenerated from the server's OpenAPI spec.

scripts.generate: bun run openapi-ts && bun run scripts/generate.ts
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run generate:check && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build:browser-check && bun run build && bun run build:smoke
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm && bun build src/node.ts --outfile dist/node.js --target node --format esm && bun x tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun run scripts/fix-dts-extensions.ts
